---
title: "Rāg Chāyānaṭ"
subtitle: "*śambhū hara maheśa*"
description: "Composition by Raṅganāth, in Suraphāktāl (Madhyalay)"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Raṅganāth &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Suraphāktāl (Madhyalay)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> śambhū hara maheśa ādi trilocana bhava-bhaya-hara bhaveśa  
> dīnanātha dānava-dalana dīneśvara

**Antarā**

> jaṭājūta pinākī bhasma runḍamala garala gare dhara  
> hara oḍha bāghāmbara

**Sanchārī**

> nācata candra bhāla bam bam bāje ghana ghana  
> ati apūrva hari guṇa gāvata tripureśvara

**Ābhog**

> bīracandra narapati prakāśa karana so  
> adhara dhara sumadhura tāna sāca sundara

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Suraphāktāl is a 10-beat cycle divided as **4 + 2 + 4** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **2**, **3**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the ten columns correspond to beats 1–10, with sam **X** at beat 1, **2** at beat 5, and **3** at beat 7. 

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| $\tr{S}$ | $-$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $D$ | $D$ | $P$ | $P$ | $R$ | $R$ |
| **śa** | **-** | **mbhū** | **-** | **ha** | **ra** | **ma** | **he** | **-** | **śa** |
| $R$ | $G$ | $m$ | $P$ | $m$ | $-$ | $G$ | $m$ | $R$ | $S$ |
| **ā** | **-** | **di** | **tri** | **lo** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ca** | **na** |
| $\lb{mG}$ | $m$ | $R$ | $R$ | $S$ | $S$ | $S$ | $\lb{\sps{\mn{N}}S}$ | $\mn{D}$ | $\mn{P}$ |
| **bha** | **va** | **bha** | **ya** | **ha** | **ra** | **bha** | **ve** | **-** | **śa** |
| $\mn{P}$ | $R$ | $R$ | $R$ | $\lb{GR}$ | $G$ | $m$ | $-$ | $P$ | $P$ |
| **dī** | **-** | **na** | **nā** | **-** | **tha** | **dā** | **-** | **na** | **va** |
| $\lb{\tr{S}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $D$ | $P$ | $m$ | $-$ | $G$ | $m$ | $R$ | $S$ |
| **da** | **la** | **na** | **dī** | **ne** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **śva** | **ra** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| $P$ | $P$ | $-$ | $\tr{S}$ | $-$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $-$ | $\tr{S}$ |
| **ja** | **ṭā** | **-** | **jū** | **-** | **ṭa** | **pi** | **nā** | **-** | **kī** |
| $\tr{S}$ | $-$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $-$ | $N$ | $D$ | $\lb{\tr{R}\tr{S}}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $-$ |
| **bha** | **-** | **sma** | **ru** | **-** | **nḍa** | **ma** | **-** | **la** | **-** |
| $\tr{G}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{G}$ | $\tr{m}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $N$ | $D$ | $N$ |
| **ga** | **ra** | **la** | **ga** | **re** | **-** | **dha** | **ra** | **ha** | **ra** |
| $\tr{S}$ | $N$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $-$ | $N$ | $\tr{S}$ | $D$ | $P$ |
| **o** | **-** | **ḍha** | **bā** | **ghā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **mva** | **ra** |

:::

## Sanchārī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| $G$ | $-$ | $m$ | $R$ | $G$ | $-$ | $m$ | $P$ | $-$ | $P$ |
| **nā** | **-** | **ca** | **ta** | **ca** | **-** | **ndra** | **bhā** | **-** | **la** |
| $P$ | $-$ | $N$ | $D$ | $N$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{S}}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $D$ | $P$ |
| **vam** | **-** | **va** | **m\*** | **vā** | **je** | **gha** | **na** | **gha** | **na** |
| $G$ | $-$ | $m$ | $R$ | $G$ | $-$ | $m$ | $P$ | $-$ | $P$ |
| **nā** | **-** | **ca** | **ta** | **ca** | **-** | **ndra** | **bhā** | **-** | **la** |
| $P$ | $-$ | $N$ | $D$ | $N$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{S}}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $D$ | $P$ |
| **bam** | **-** | **ba** | **m** | **bā** | **je** | **gha** | **na** | **gha** | **na** |
| $P$ | $P$ | $P$ | $P$ | $-$ | $P$ | $m$ | $G$ | $m$ | $R$ |
| **a** | **ti** | **a** | **pū** | **-** | **rba** | **ha** | **ri** | **gu** | **ṇa** |
| $\lb{\sps{G}R}$ | $G$ | $G$ | $m$ | $\lb{\sps{m}D}$ | $P$ | $\lb{mG}$ | $m$ | $R$ | $S$ |
| **gā** | **-** | **va** | **ta** | **tri** | **pu** | **re** | **-** | **śva** | **ra** |

:::

## Ābhog {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| $P$ | $-$ | $P$ | $N$ | $D$ | $N$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ |
| **bī** | **-** | **ra** | **ca** | **-** | **ndra** | **na** | **ra** | **pa** | **ti** |
| $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $-$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{G}$ | $\tr{m}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $-$ | $\tr{S}$ | $N$ |
| **pra** | **kā** | **-** | **śa** | **ka** | **ra** | **na** | **-** | **so** | **-** |
| $D$ | $N$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $N$ | $D$ | $P$ | $P$ | $R$ |
| **a** | **dha** | **ra** | **dha** | **ra** | **-** | **su** | **ma** | **dhu** | **-** |
| $R$ | $R$ | $\lb{GR}$ | $G$ | $m$ | $P$ | $\lb{mG}$ | $m$ | $R$ | $S$ |
| **ra** | **tā** | **-** | **na** | **sā** | **ca** | **su** | **-** | **nda** | **ra** |

:::
